summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the blog page redesign. All 16 test features passed. Blog listing page shows hero feature post at top with editorial rows below in alternating layout (image-left/text-right, text-left/image-right). Blog detail page has full-width hero, proper content blocks (paragraph, quote, full_image, two_image_grid), 4-image gallery, and CTA with 'Begin Your Celebration' button. No rounded corners on any blog images/containers. Header is non-sticky on blog detail pages.
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing 5 seed blog posts from backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog redesign testing completed. All 16 features verified: (1) Hero post at top with wide image, category, title, excerpt, date, Read More - PASS, (2) Alternating editorial rows with correct layout - PASS, (3) Scroll animations with RevealBlock component - PASS, (4) Click navigation to detail pages - PASS, (5) Category filter works - PASS, (6) No rounded corners on listing images - PASS, (7) Full-width hero on detail page - PASS, (8) Title/meta displayed correctly - PASS, (9) Content blocks render properly - PASS, (10) 4-image gallery grid - PASS, (11) CTA with 'Begin Your Celebration' - PASS, (12) No duplicate CTA buttons - PASS, (13) Header non-sticky on detail pages - PASS, (14) 5 sample posts present - PASS, (15) No rounded corners on detail images - PASS, (16) API fetches data dynamically - PASS.

features_tested.hero_feature_post_at_top: PASS - Hero post displays with wide image, category, title, excerpt, date, and Read More link
features_tested.alternating_editorial_rows: PASS - Row 1 image-left/text-right, Row 2 text-left/image-right, etc.
features_tested.scroll_animations: PASS - RevealBlock component applies reveal-left/reveal-right directions correctly
features_tested.click_navigation: PASS - Clicking image/title/text navigates to blog detail page
features_tested.category_filter: PASS - Filter buttons work correctly (All, Corporate Events, SFX & Entries, Weddings)
features_tested.no_rounded_corners_listing: PASS - No rounded corners on blog listing images
features_tested.full_width_hero_detail: PASS - Full-width cinematic hero image at top of detail page
features_tested.title_meta_display: PASS - Title, category, author, date shown below hero
features_tested.content_blocks_render: PASS - paragraph, full_image, two_image_grid, quote blocks render correctly
features_tested.cta_begin_your_celebration: PASS - CTA section with 'Begin Your Celebration' button
features_tested.no_duplicate_cta_button: PASS - Only 1 'Begin Your Celebration' button found
features_tested.header_non_sticky: PASS - Header has 'relative' class (non-sticky) on blog detail pages
features_tested.five_sample_posts: PASS - All 5 expected posts found: designing-a-regal-wedding-experience, creating-an-unforgettable-sangeet-night, the-art-of-luxury-wedding-decor, planning-a-grand-south-indian-wedding, curating-the-perfect-wedding-entrance
features_tested.no_rounded_corners_detail: PASS - No rounded corners on any detail page images/containers
features_tested.api_dynamic_fetch: PASS - /api/blog/posts returns 5 published posts, /api/blog/posts/:slug returns individual posts
